notes: Control test — known legitimate site. Correct result: LOW. Domain is 9,983 days old (registered 1997-03-29), MarkMonitor registrar, self-managed DNS (a.ns.facebook.com etc.), valid DV cert from DigiCert 59 days to expiry, all 4 trust signals present. No Cloudflare (Meta/Facebook CDN). Only signal: dv_cert_only (+5) — DV cert is standard even for large orgs issuing short-lived certs via automation.

issuer.CN: DigiCert SHA2 High Assurance Server CA

metadata.title: Facebook – log in or sign up
metadata.description: Create an account or log into Facebook. Connect with friends, family and other people you know.
